turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Hi, I need an appointment this week if possible, and—sorry, quick question, do you guys do video visits too?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Sure, that’s fine! So, can I get an appointment this week? I really need to see someone soon.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Maria?

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: No, it’s Angela Ford. I’m just trying to book an appointment for this week. Can you help me with that?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: I can help with that, please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient. Who needs the appointment?

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: It's Angela Ford, and my birthday is February 14, 1987. I need the appointment pretty urgently—do you have any openings this week?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: To confirm. I have your name as Angela Ford in your date of birth as February 14th. 1987 is that correct?

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Yes, that's correct! So, can we get to the appointment part? What do you have available this week?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: I can't book the appointment right now but I'll connect you to our patient support team for help. Please stay on the line, connecting you to a representative.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Wait, I can’t just be transferred! I really need to get this appointment scheduled. Can you please check for openings first?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Hello, you've reached the pretty good. AI test line, goodbye.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Uh, excuse me? I didn't mean to be transferred! I really need this appointment. Can someone help me with that?
